narrative:
Fremont City Sd city school district has 18,904 registered voters, with 57.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a clear Republican lean of 11.8 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -3.5% D−R vs -16.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
